name: autorent-iac
description: Complete local dev environment for a car rental app provisioned with Vagrant + Ansible + Nginx. One command brings up the entire infra — identical for every developer.

name: autorent-docker
description: Car rental app containerized with Docker + Nginx. Single command setup, ~33,000 req/s with 0% error rate after Nginx tuning.

name: web-dev-workstation
description: Ansible playbook to provision a complete PHP web development workstation on Ubuntu — from a fresh install to a fully operational environment in a single command.

name: docker-php-multiversion
description: 100% containerized environment running PHP 5.6 and PHP 7.0 side by side with Nginx reverse proxy, Redis and Memcached. Solves legacy + modern coexistence conflicts.

name: ubuntu_domain_playbook
description: Ansible playbooks (monolithic and modular) to add Ubuntu machines to an Active Directory domain — change hostname, create local users, and join the domain.

name: vault
description: Web app for encrypting and decrypting files using AES-256-GCM. Built with Python/Flask and containerized with Docker. Auto key generation and drag & drop interface.
